stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 14, the presence of objects which must be lighted shall be indicated by _____.

options.a: Flashing white/red lights situated as close as practicable to the top of the object.
options.b: Low-, medium- or high-intensity obstacle lights, or a combination of such lights.
options.c: Flashing white/red lights of at least 500 cd intensity.
options.d: Only high-intensity type A and type B lights.
